pitchSequence.description: Curveball, swung on and missed, Topanga strikes out

notes: 4-pitch AB, strikeout swinging on a curveball. Count was 1-2 when struck out. Righty vs righty.

pitchSequence.description: Fouled back and out of play
Hit in the air to deep right field, knuckles foul and out of play
Popped up, left side. Patterson is under it and makes the catch.

notes: 4-pitch AB, pop out to Patterson at 3B. Count was 1-2 when put in play. Righty vs righty.

pitchSequence.description: Fouled back and out of play
Swing and a miss on a low fastball, Sanborn strikes out

notes: 3-pitch AB, strikeout swinging on a low fastball. Count was 0-2 when struck out. Righty vs righty. Padolina sets the Loons down in order in the top of the fifth.

pitchSequence.description: Fly ball into left-center, drops in front of a diving Bradleys. Ball rolls all the way to the wall. Ortega hustling to second, digging for three, slides in safely just ahead of the tag.

notes: 1-pitch AB, leadoff triple to left-center. Put in play on the first pitch. Righty vs righty. Ball drops in front of diving Bradleys and rolls to the wall.

pitchSequence.description: Hammered foul and into the stands
Flared into shallow center, drops in for a hit. Ortega comes in to score.

notes: 3-pitch AB, RBI single (Texas leaguer) to shallow center. Count was 0-2 when put in play. Righty vs righty. Ortega scores from third. Score now 5-1 Cars. Fourth career RBI for Padolina.

pitchSequence.description: Popped up over the plate. Sunderland is under it and makes the catch.

notes: 1-pitch AB, pop out to Sunderland at catcher. Put in play on the first pitch.

pitchSequence.description: Fouled back and out of play
Hard grounder to short, Stipe to second for one, over to first in time. 6-4-3 double play ends the inning.

notes: 3-pitch AB, 6-4-3 double play ends the inning. Count was 1-1 when put in play. Cars score one run in the inning. Score now 5-1 Cars.
